posts.author: Candace (Candace C)
posts.cookedHtml:
Suggestion: Automation- Assign sub-items automatically to people/my self
Since my small team is the only one to use this platform and I need to easily keep track of tasks/next steps I’ve been assigning this automation to items in groups. I would like to do this for sub-items as well.
